pageContext.name: Monica Geller 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The sixth release in the FRIENDS™ Chibi® Coin series features Monica Geller™. She is the last of the six friends to be released, but definitely not the least. Intelligent and warm-hearted, Monica is a chef who enjoys cleaning and looking after her friends.  This 1oz pure silver piece is shaped and colored to resemble Monica in her chef's uniform, but as Chibi art. The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.  Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin arrives in a FRIENDS™-themed case and includes a large window, perfect for display. The Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back, which further confirms the coin's legal tender status, along with its unique serial number in the limited mintage of 2,000.   A true epitome of intelligent and warm-hearted — who's a better character to look up to than Monica?   Order today and get the whole gang together!
